1057.issue: [E1057] admin 7.0.25 listed as dependency but 7.6.17 is required as minimum, 7.6.20 is recommended. Please update globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.docker-manager/blob/master/io-package.json).

1084.issue: [S1084] "common.singletonHost" detected for non onlyWWW adapter. Is this really desired?

4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

4047.issue: [S4047] Adapter "docker-manager" is not yet available in the stable repository. Please consider adding it.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#96] "[iobroker-bot] Update Node.js versions in test-and-release workflow"](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.docker-manager/issues/96)

8905.issue: [W8905] Repository contains [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.docker-manager/blob/master/package.json) files in non-root directories (e.g. /src-admin/package.json). Dependabot may miss updates unless the "npm" ecosystem entry uses "directories: ['**/*']" instead of "directory: '/'"

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("github-actions", "npm", "npm") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

8908.issue: [S8908] Dependabot entry for "npm" has "open-pull-requests-limit: 7". A limit of at least 15 is recommended.

8913.issue: [S8913] No automerge workflow for dependabot PRs found. Consider setting up automerging by adding ".github/workflows/automerge-dependabot.yml".

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/src-admin") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

9006.issue: [S9006] .commitinfo file should be excluded by .gitignore, please add a line with text ".commitinfo" to .gitignore

0037.issue: [W0037] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-license 4.0.0 specified. 5.1.1 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.docker-manager/blob/master/package.json)
